overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 through a rain-slicked dystopian city at night. The vehicle navigates neon-drenched streets lined with holographic advertisements and towering glass buildings, passing through a concrete underpass tunnel and emerging into a commercial district with hotels and retail storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial downtown boulevard with holographic ads

agents.ego_description: cruising through wet city streets at moderate speed, passing towering buildings covered in digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: car driving ahead in same lane, maintaining distance

entered.detail: large illuminated advertising screens covering building facades with rotating cyberpunk imagery
tall reflective building with neon accents and holographic projections
bright pink and cyan commercial signs attached to building exteriors
floating 3D product advertisement projected above street level
overhead roadway with support columns visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The vehicle navigates a wide commercial boulevard lined with towering glass buildings covered in massive digital billboards and holographic advertisements. The wet asphalt reflects the neon pink and cyan lights. Sparse pedestrian activity is visible on sidewalks while a few other vehicles share the road.

events.description: vehicle enters concrete tunnel portal, transitioning from open street to enclosed underpass

agents.ego_description: navigating through intersections and approaching tunnel entrance, making slight steering adjustments

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on road surface
heavy concrete structure spanning the roadway with support beams
dark portal with concrete walls leading to underground passage
illuminated entrance to the underpass with road signs above

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches an intersection marked with crosswalks, passing under a concrete overpass structure. The scene transitions as the vehicle enters a tunnel portal around 22 seconds, moving from the open neon-lit street into a more enclosed concrete environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete underpass tunnel with artificial lighting

events.description: approaching tunnel exit, greenish artificial lighting transitions to bright neon city lights ahead

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed through the enclosed tunnel with concrete walls on both sides

notable_agents.action: oncoming vehicle with headlights visible approaching from the opposite direction

entered.detail: smooth gray concrete surfaces lining both sides of the underpass
overhead fluorescent lights casting greenish illumination throughout the tunnel
bending passage with reflective road markers

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels through a narrow concrete underpass with artificial greenish lighting and smooth walls on both sides. The enclosed space creates an echoing atmosphere with overhead fixtures illuminating the path. Around 35 seconds, the tunnel exit becomes visible ahead with bright neon lights marking the return to the open city.

scene_state.functional_zone: post-tunnel commercial district with hotels and retail

events.description: exiting tunnel into open urban area with visible hotel signage and street-level commercial activity

agents.ego_description: navigating through commercial streets with hotel and shop fronts visible, observing pedestrians on sidewalks

notable_agents.action: pedestrians walking along sidewalk near hotel entrance

entered.detail: large illuminated sign reading HOTEL with Japanese characters in bright cyan neon
multi-story building with entrance canopy and decorative lighting
ground-level shops with illuminated windows and signage
tall structure covered in multiple digital screens displaying advertisements

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel, the scene opens into a commercial district featuring a prominent hotel with bright cyan neon signage. Street-level shops line the sidewalks where pedestrians are visible walking. The vehicle continues through this medium-width street with various digital advertisements and glass office buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial corridor with elevated walkways

agents.ego_description: continuing through dense commercial area with multiple billboards and elevated infrastructure visible

entered.detail: dense cluster of buildings with multiple neon signs and holographic displays
pedestrian bridge or transit line running above street level with support columns
concentrated area of bright pink and yellow commercial signs

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows continued driving through a dense commercial corridor with elevated walkway structures visible on the left. The street is lined with cyberpunk-style commercial blocks covered in neon signage clusters. The wet road continues to reflect the vibrant city lights as the vehicle maintains steady progress through the urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a neon-drenched commercial district that transitions into a claustrophobic concrete underpass before emerging back into the city. It begins on a wide boulevard where the wet asphalt reflects the vibrant pink and cyan glow of massive digital billboards and holographic advertisements clinging to towering glass buildings. As the vehicle approaches a marked intersection, the open skyline vanishes when the camera glides beneath a concrete overpass and enters a tunnel portal. The scene then shifts into a narrow, enclosed underpass characterized by smooth walls and artificial greenish lighting that creates a stark contrast to the previous neon brilliance. Finally, the oppressive concrete walls recede as the vehicle heads toward a bright exit, where the distant glow of the city's neon lights signals a return to the open streets.

The shot follows a continuous drive from the mouth of a concrete tunnel into a dense, neon-saturated commercial corridor. It begins as the vehicle emerges into a district defined by a prominent hotel with bright cyan signage and street-level shops where pedestrians walk along the sidewalks. As the car progresses through the medium-width street, the environment shifts toward a more crowded urban landscape filled with glass office buildings and flickering digital advertisements. The scene then expands into a dense corridor of cyberpunk commercial blocks, passing beneath elevated walkway structures that loom over the left side of the road. Finally, the vehicle maintains a steady pace through the city, with the rain-slicked pavement continuously reflecting the vibrant clusters of neon lights overhead.
